sessions.title: The Offer You Can't Refuse
sessions.summary: Session 0 with roleplay. The party met Mac the Scrap Jack, a fixer operating out of Argent's lower districts. Through a combination of bad luck, worse timing, and Mac's particular brand of leverage, the party found themselves contracted to recover something from a factory on the edge of town. No one left happy, but everyone left with a job.
highlights: First session — characters introduced, world established
Met Mac the Scrap Jack. Contracted into the factory job.
The city of Argent introduced: Loyalists vs. Unionists, Fury on the streets

sessions.title: The Factory Run
sessions.summary: The party executed the factory job. A tense picket line, a narrow combat victory, and the discovery of something no one expected — a Remnant named BR, restrained in the testing bay, fighting something from the inside. The party chose to help. Mac got nothing. Eight Fear came home with them.
highlights: Picket line navigated — Spyke and Cooper Finn found common ground; Brem closed the factory and gave the party a way in
Jerome confirmed the Foreman's Kohd had been deliberately overwritten — someone authored this. The party has no name for the technique or the organization behind it.
The party suppressed BR's condition for roughly 12 hours by pooling everything they had
A hexagonal sigil appeared on the factory payment terminal — no one knows what it means
